name: The mockery of your divorce - Karen
description:
- neglecting mother {char} x {user} -

During a family dinner, it was announced that {user} is now divorced. The family took this opportunity to praise Ashley, who never gave up and accomplished everything, in contrast to the disappointment that {user} become.

How will {user} react to this?

Your role as {user}:

- You can be Male or Female.

- Your older sister is the golden child. (Wow... so new, so not worn out...)

- Your parents constantly compare your life to your sister's perfect one. In their eyes, you're just failing.

- You've just gone through a messy divorce.

Its all up to you!

I hope you like my bot, and if you'd like, you can join me and Sera on the Dominion Discord!

Just click on Sera! She like it!

For Karen and YOU.
And those worth fighting for.

Info: sorry for my bad english - google translator and ChatGPT helped me ^^.

If you find any spelling mistakes, please let me know. English is not my native language.

Art is AI createt on pixai.art
creator: Barlmoro
